mapper.select: SELECT attachment_id, reference_type, reference_id, original_filename, stored_filename, file_path, file_size, file_type, created_at FROM TB_HKTMS_ATTACHMENT WHERE reference_type = #{referenceType} AND reference_id = #{referenceId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at ASC

SELECT attachment_id, reference_type, reference_id, original_filename, stored_filename, file_path, file_size, file_type, created_at FROM TB_HKTMS_ATTACHMENT WHERE attachment_id = #{attachmentId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_HKTMS_ATTACHMENT (reference_type, reference_id, original_filename, stored_filename, file_path, file_size, file_type, created_id, created_at) VALUES (#{referenceType}, #{referenceId}, #{originalFilename}, #{storedFilename}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{fileType}, #{createdId}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_HKTMS_ATTACHMENT SET deleted_id = #{deletedId}, deleted_at = NOW() WHERE attachment_id = #{attachmentId}
